candidate_definitions.text: Terraform AWS module which provisions ACK addons on EKS
Terraform module which provisions [AWS controllers for Kubernetes](https://aws-controllers-k8s.github.io/community/docs/community/overview/) on EKS.
Terraform AWS module which creates an EKS addon (helm release + IRSA)

Terraform module which provisions an addon ([Helm release](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/helm/latest/docs/resources/release)) and an [IAM role for service accounts (IRSA)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eks/latest/userguide/iam-roles-for-service-accounts.html).
Terraform module which provisions addons on Amazon EKS clusters
Terraform module to deploy Kubernetes addons on Amazon EKS clusters.

candidate_glosses.text: Terraform module which provisions [AWS controllers for Kubernetes](https://aws-controllers-k8s.github.io/community/docs/community/overview/) on EKS.

Terraform module which provisions an addon ([Helm release](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/helm/latest/docs/resources/release)) and an [IAM role for service accounts (IRSA)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eks/latest/userguide/iam-roles-for-service-accounts.html).
Terraform module to deploy Kubernetes addons on Amazon EKS clusters.
